ddls:
CREATE TABLE "videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the video */,
  "trending_date" TEXT /* Date the video started trending */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the channel that uploaded the video */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the video */,
  "publish_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the video was published */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the video */,
  "thumbnail_link" TEXT /* Link to the video's thumbnail image */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the video in seconds */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video file */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Total number of views */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Total number of likes */,
  "dislike_count" INTEGER /* Total number of dislikes */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Total number of comments */,
  "is_trending" INTEGER /* Indicates if the video is currently trending */,
  "trending_rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the video in the trending list */,
  "is_restricted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the video has age or content restrictions */,
  "is_monetized" INTEGER /* Indicates if the video is monetized */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the video */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel */,
  "channel_title" TEXT /* Title of the channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the channel's content */,
  "channel_url" TEXT /* URL of the channel */,
  "subscriber_count" INTEGER /* Number of subscribers to the channel */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the channel was created */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the channel is verified */,
  "is_partner" INTEGER /* Indicates if the channel is a partner */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content the channel primarily produces */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the category icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the metric record */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video associated with these metrics */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Total number of views for the video */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Total number of likes for the video */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Total number of dislikes for the video */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Total number of comments on the video */,
  "share_count" INTEGER /* Total number of times the video has been shared */,
  "watch_time" INTEGER /* Total watch time in seconds */,
  "average_view_duration" INTEGER /* Average view duration in seconds */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate calculated as (likes + comments + shares) / views */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the metrics were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_metrics_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag record */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video associated with the tag */,
  "tag" TEXT /* The actual tag associated with the video */,
  "tag_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the tag for search ranking */,
  "is_popular" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tag is popular */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user engaging with the video */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video being engaged with */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement activity */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., view, like, comment) */,
  "engagement_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the engagement */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for engagement */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform on which the engagement occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the issue record */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video with the issue */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of the issue */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was reported */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the issue has been resolved */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the issue */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the issue */,
  "reported_by_name" TEXT /* Name of the user who reported the issue */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the issue */,
  "resolved_by_name" TEXT /* Name of the user who resolved the issue */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes on how the issue was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last activity */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio or description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles_mapping" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_mapping_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_mapping_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
